items.excerpt: Panjaya.ai and Shortical partnered to bring AI-powered localization across six languages, automating translation, voice-performance adaptation, timing and lip-sync while preserving the source's emotional register.

Pixar alum Connie He directed 'Dear Upstairs Neighbors,' a Tribeca-premiering short made with Google DeepMind's custom video-generation models alongside a 45-person crew of former Pixar collaborators, blending AI-generated visuals with traditional animation craft.

Utopai Studios and China's Huace Film & TV announced a co-production of a fully AI-generated animated series 'Journey to the West: The Lost Five Hundred Years,' using Utopai's cinematic storytelling AI system PAI, with a planned theatrical franchise.

Mark Stern and Lloyd Braun launched Intelligent Animation, a studio fusing traditional animation with proprietary AI tools, driven by the philosophy that new technologies should serve a human-led creative process — enabling faster, cheaper production without displacing artists.

IndieWire's analysis of the A24/Google DeepMind $75M partnership focuses on workflow access — DeepMind gains insight into A24's production culture in exchange for building AI tools, making this a bet on shaping the future of indie filmmaking infrastructure.

Adobe has agreed to acquire Topaz Labs, whose Emmy Award-winning AI models for video upscaling, noise reduction, and image enhancement will be integrated across Adobe's creative AI portfolio including Premiere Pro and After Effects for post-production pipelines.

No Film School covers Adobe's Topaz Labs acquisition, explaining what it means for filmmakers: industry-leading AI upscaling and restoration built into Creative Cloud, lowering the barrier for archival footage enhancement and high-quality finishing.

Neon acquired 'Artificial,' Luca Guadagnino's nearly completed film starring Andrew Garfield as Sam Altman, after Amazon MGM dropped it; the film's journey from prestige streaming to boutique distributor reflects how AI-themed content itself is navigating an unsettled industry.

Studios are quietly using AI to smooth rough edges, alter dialogue, and polish visual effects in finished films while keeping the credits clean — one AI company is credited on only a fifth of the projects it works on, with nearly 80% of its work going unacknowledged including contributions to a 2026 box office hit.

postPerspective covers Adobe's Topaz Labs acquisition from a post-production trade perspective, detailing how AI-driven upscaling, restoration, and noise-reduction tools will fold into professional finishing pipelines for film and episodic work.

Universal Pictures used Love Hurts as a testbed for end-to-end cloud-based production and post with AWS, Company 3, and Pixelogic — centralizing AI-assisted dailies, VFX plate pulls, color, and mastering into a single cloud repository, a model likely to influence how major films are made.
